'''Korren Starchaser''' was a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services]] since its inception, and flew his own custom-built [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Jedi Dreamer]]''. He was the first to chart the [[Serianan system/Legends|Serias]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] and recovered artifacts from [[The Gulch]]. Among his other discoveries were the [[Kriekaal]] system and its native species, the [[Kriek]]s. In addition to his expertise as an explorer, Starchaser was the developer of the [[vagabond suit]].
